---
id: ssh-key-create
title: "Add an SSH-key to a specific app"
description: "Add an SSH-key to a specific app. After creating an app, you need to register the SSH key so that Bitrise will be able to access and clone your repository during the build process. This requires the app slug of your newly created app."
sidebar_label: "Add an SSH-key to a specific app"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-ci/api/api-reference/bitrise-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Add an SSH-key to a specific app"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/register-ssh-key"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Add an SSH-key to a specific app. After creating an app, you need to register the SSH key so that Bitrise will be able to access and clone your repository during the build process. This requires the app slug of your newly created app.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./ssh-key-create.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  {...require("./ssh-key-create.StatusCodes.json")}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
